label: 1543 CE
era_summary: Year 1543 (MDXLIII) was a common year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar. It is one of the years sometimes referred to as an "Annus mirabilis" because of its significant publications in science, considered the start of the Scientific Revolution.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1543: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Pope-Papal States, Camerino, 1540-45; Turkey-emperor, Papal states, 1541-44. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1543: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Chile, 1540-61; Algiers-emperor, Spain, Italy, 1542-44. Maddison records GDP/capita 1363 (ESP, 1543) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

francia.summary: Active conflicts in 1543: France, Cleves, Denmark, Sweden-emperor, 1542-44; Sweden (religious, peasants, with intervention by France), 1542-43.
